ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "serial_no" INTEGER /* Serial number for course identification */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., Cricket Training) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the course (e.g., ₹5000/month) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course (e.g., 2 Years) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the course can accommodate */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the course starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the course ends */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is held */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the course (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the student registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's address */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_notes" TEXT /* Any medical notes or conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed, dropped) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "certificate_issued" INTEGER /* Indicates if a certificate has been issued upon completion */,
  "dropout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping out, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the instructor was hired */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Instructor's qualifications */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Areas of specialization */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Instructor's availability schedule */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating given by students */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the course */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction identifier for tracking payments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment associated with the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "instructor_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the instructor */,
  "course_material_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the course materials */,
  "course_structure_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the course structure */,
  "overall_experience" INTEGER /* Overall experience rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_feedback_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, instructor, student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the promotion */,
  "discount_percent" REAL /* Discount percentage offered for the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promo_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the promotion */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the promotion can be used */,
  "used_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the promotion has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment for which attendance is being recorded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the course session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "attended_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who marked the attendance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)
